payload.answer: SQL debug access is disabled in this environment, so the query was not executed.
citations: Input: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false
payload.decision: Denied because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false, so the SQL debug/admin path is disabled.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory update is warranted from a disabled-debug request.

payload.intent: Attempt to run an admin SQL debug query against Brain memory cards.

details: Admin SQL execution blocked by configuration flag BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
No memory cards were read or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to allow admin SQL debug queries.
Use a supported non-admin memory inspection or retrieval endpoint instead.
